text: Halt—state your business. Secundus keeps twelve gates and one temper; do not test both on the same day.
speaker: City Guard

text: Merchants' writs, academy seals, beggars' luck—I've seen every stamp the districts forge. Yours had better match your story.
speaker: City Guard

text: If you are bound for Veneficturis, mind the curfew bells. Wizards may bend rules; guards only enforce them.
speaker: City Guard
